panels.title: Moyenne des 30 meilleurs jours/an
panels.description: Uses the average yield of the best 30 days per year. This can help identify possible degradation, but must be interpreted in context. Individual years are not conclusive on their own.

panels.title: Moyenne des 5 meilleurs jours/mois
panels.description: Uses the average yield of the best 5 days per month. This can help identify possible degradation, but must be interpreted in context. Individual months are not conclusive on their own.

targets.expr: label_join(label_set(clamp_min((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_cost_daily_eur{db="$dbLabel"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month) - sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur{db="$dbLabel"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month)), 0), "kind", "Costs"), "series", " ", "local_year", "kind") or (label_join(label_set(clamp_min((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur{db="$dbLabel"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month) - sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_cost_daily_eur{db="$dbLabel"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month)), 0), "kind", "Income"), "series", " ", "local_year", "kind") and on (local_year) (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur{db="$dbLabel"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year) > 0))
